news.title: US Treasury weighs repo role for cash, liquidity management
news.desc: Reuters reports the US Treasury is considering investing its cash balances in the repo market as a liquidity management tool. Currently SOFR stands at 3.62% vs Fed IORB at 3.65%, creating incentives for Treasury to explore repo deployment of its cash reserves, which could meaningfully impact money market dynamics and overall USD liquidity conditions.

news.title: Reducing the Fed's Balance Sheet Would Be Risky, Unlikely to Be Rapid — Fitch Ratings
news.desc: Fitch warns that further balance sheet reduction would be risky. The Fed ended QT and began expanding its balance sheet in December 2025, but recent Fed staff analysis suggests any future shrinkage should be cautious and gradual to avoid destabilizing bank reserves and money market functioning.

news.title: 美债季度再融资1250亿不变，TGA现金余额7月底或达万亿峰值
news.desc: 美国财政部公布2026年5月季度再融资规模维持1250亿美元不变，TGA余额预计6月底达9000亿美元、7月底冲击1万亿美元。财政部将增加短期国库券发行并于5月底发行CMB。TGA快速累积将从市场抽走流动性，叠加关税不确定性，季末资金面收紧风险值得关注。
